name: Google Forms
description: Online form and survey builder in Google Workspace for collecting responses into Sheets.

years.notes: Material Design rounded purple sheet with folded corner (Deep Purple 500 #673AB7), inner question checkboxes and lines in #F1F1F1, lighter fold triangle in Deep Purple 200 #B39DDB, and #311B92 shadow gradient. Used 2014-2020 across Drive, Workspace and consumer surfaces. Redrawn to a 24×24 viewBox (translate(3.2727 0) scale(0.36364) over the native 48×66 source) preserving aspect ratio and original geometry.

Workspace 2020 refresh. Unlike Docs/Sheets/Slides — which adopted the four-color outline rule — Forms kept its purple identity: a flat rounded-square sheet in #7248B9 with a darker fold #56368A and a single white outlined sheet of three checkbox-line rows. Redrawn to a 24×24 viewBox (translate(3.2727 0) scale(0.27273) over the native 64×88 source). Current mark as of 2026.
